sections.paragraph:
- Original: πορεύομαι

- Transliteration: Poreuomai

- Phonetic: por-yoo'-om-ahee

- Definition:

1. to lead over, carry over, transfer

a. to pursue the journey on which one has entered, to continue on one's journey

b. to depart from life

c. to follow one, that is: become his adherent

1. to lead or order one's life

- Origin: middle voice from a derivative of the same as G3984

- TDNT entry: 15:26,9

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Middle voice from a derivative of the same as G3984; to traverse that is travel (literally or figuratively; especially to remove [figuratively die] live etc.): - depart go (away forth one´ s way up) (make a take a) journey walk.
